# Streamable HTTP exposes the shared MCP registry beside REST and the web UI.
env MINA_FX_AUTO_LOAD_ENABLED=false
freeport
exec mina serve --demo --db $WORK/mcp-http.db --yes --host 127.0.0.1 --port $PORT --quiet &server&
httpwait -timeout 10s '"status":"ok"' http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health

mcphttp http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/mcp
stdout 'initialize=ok tools=83 transactions_list=ok origin=forbidden'
httpget http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/health
stdout '"status":"ok"'
httpget -accept text/html http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/
stdout '<div id="root"></div>'
! stderr .

kill -INT server
wait server
